summary: The patient’s GCS score based on responding to verbal stimuli, moving all limbs independently, and appropriate verbal responses totals initially as 15; applying the adjustment for scores over 13 caps this at 14. Hence, their GCS score is 14. Mechanical ventilation does not affect the calculation directly under normal circumstances unless specified otherwise by specific instructions or conditions provided within detailed medical protocols
